SPIRE1REVAMPED-MILLENNIUM_EGG.descriptio: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] into [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|a starter card into an ancient version}.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-MILLENNIUM_EGG.eventDescr: [gold]Transform[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] into [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|a starter card into an ancient version}.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-MILLENNIUM_EGG.title: Millennium Egg
SPIRE1REVAMPED-MARK_OF_PAIN.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]2[/blue] [red]Pain[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-MARK_OF_PAIN.title: Mark of Pain
SPIRE1REVAMPED-HOVERING_KITE.description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-HOVERING_KITE.selectionSc: Choose a card to discard and gain energy.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-HOVERING_KITE.flavor: [red]Floats using the power of friendship... and corpses.[/red]
SPIRE1REVAMPED-HOVERING_KITE.title: Hovering Kite
SPIRE1REVAMPED-MONOCLE.description: Cards have 1 {Energy:energyIcons()} cost converted to 1 {singleStarIcon} cost.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-MONOCLE.title: Monocle
SPIRE1REVAMPED-BLEEDING_ANVIL.title: Bleeding Anvil
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FROZEN_BATTERY.descriptio: Whenever you play a Power, trigger the passive ability of your rightmost Orb.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FROZEN_BATTERY.title: Frozen Battery
